experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Reduced filter response time from 2s to under 500ms on 1M+ record datasets by restructuring client-side filtering into a batched apply flow
Increased arbitrage accuracy to 95% across ROI, fees, and sales-velocity estimates by integrating Amazon SP-API and Keepa API with custom profit calculations
Reduced backend requests by 40% while keeping 700k records responsive by optimizing data-heavy UI workflows with Redux-Saga, debounced search, pagination, and indexed Firestore queries
Built a responsive UI layer over a backend pipeline that filters 800M+ products monthly down to 1M eligible results, keeping large datasets fluid under heavy filtering and sorting
Eliminated multi-second page transitions by adding deterministic prefetching of adjacent result pages, cutting pagination waits from 1.5s to near-instant navigation
Accelerated feature delivery by integrating AI-assisted development tools (Claude Code, Cursor) into the daily workflow for scaffolding, refactoring, and test generation

experience.title: Web Developer Intern
bullets: Designed, built, and deployed a company-wide internal web platform from the ground up, replacing a legacy structure reused across prior years and driving a 50% year-over-year traffic increase
Rebuilt an outdated, buggy blog table-of-contents plugin from scratch, adding collapsible nested-heading navigation and smooth scrolling to fix broken section tracking
Reduced repeated one-off work across multiple production sites by building reusable components and plugins, replacing duplicated implementations with shared modules used by content teams
Improved Lighthouse performance scores by 20+ points and accessibility to 90+ across key pages by acting on audit findings and applying engineering best practices
Diagnosed and resolved 8+ critical production issues tied to framework upgrades and deployment workflows, restoring build stability and preventing recurring failures

projects.name: Rolevanta
projects.summary: AI-powered resume tailoring SaaS (Next.js, FastAPI, Supabase).
bullets: Architected and shipped a full-stack AI resume platform solo in 3 months, spanning an async FastAPI backend, a React editor with drag-and-drop reordering and real-time preview, and a multi-stage AI pipeline
Drove organic traffic to 1,200 monthly visitors within 2 months of launch by architecting a programmatic SEO system spanning 350 statically pre-rendered pages
Established a 620-test suite across unit, component, and end-to-end layers enforced in CI on every pull request
Built an async FastAPI backend serving 59 endpoints with tier-gated access control, and evolved a PostgreSQL schema through 14 zero-downtime migrations supporting resume versioning and restore
Hardened production with per-endpoint rate limiting, prompt-injection input sanitization, CORS allowlisting, and idempotent Stripe webhook verification

projects.name: Plab2 Practice
projects.summary: Real-time platform for UK PLAB 2 clinical exam practice (Java, Spring Boot, React, WebSocket).
bullets: Architected a STOMP WebSocket engine synchronizing 5 session phases across 3 participant roles with a drift-free shared-timestamp timer that eliminated per-second traffic for every participant
Developed a Spring Boot REST API on Java 21 spanning 9 controllers and 6 JPA entities behind a real-time platform serving 300+ active users across multiple countries
Built thread-safe session coordination with a 10-thread scheduled executor and 4 concurrent maps tracking timers, tasks, activity, and disconnect timeouts to keep sessions consistent under load
Implemented JWT authentication with Spring Security and role-based access control separating user flows from admin dashboards while keeping session joins lightweight
Deployed Dockerized services to a production cloud environment with custom domain hosting and uptime monitoring, sustaining consistent usage from medical graduates

education.school: Algonquin College of Applied Arts and Technology
